title: Shareable Content Blocks
content_html:
Shareable Content Blocks

Define a managed workflow for sharing bounded source content, reviewing returned text, and applying accepted changes through the canonical source owner.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — product boundary, ownership direction, possible block shapes, and unresolved choices.
  • Analytics Roadmap — relative importance and sequence.

No architecture or delivery is active. Add them only when one coherent source-exchange outcome is worth building.
